commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor-owned real behavior proof and maintainer review of the approval parsing trust boundary before merge.; Needs attention: the broader balanced parser is still reachable from raw command output, expanding spoofable approval status parsing.; Review finding: [P2] Gate approval parsing to trusted lifecycle data — src/agents/exec-approval-result.ts:88 (sha=2409ba561334f741106860bf16226e60df43bdd5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces exec approval result regex parsing with balanced metadata parsing, changes the gateway timeout allowlist reason to colon-separated text, strips parentheses from node denial reasons, adds parser and followup tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main emits nested `approval-timeout (allowlist-miss)` metadata and the current `[^)]*` parser rejects that denied payload. I did not execute tests or a live gateway flow because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-owned real behavior proof and maintainer review of the approval parsing trust boundary before merge.

target.title: fix(exec): parse nested approval metadata in async followups
target.author: amittell
